category_sources: source_facts.description says Harlequin is a database client for the terminal; official site calls it a SQL IDE for the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides harlequin; official site and repository use Harlequin.
docs_sources: Official Harlequin site links a dedicated Docs section and repository README says full documentation is at harlequin.sh.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Harlequin site links GitHub, and official repository is tconbeer/harlequin.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe a terminal SQL IDE with database adapters including DuckDB.
